description: This file implements data access layer functions for managing orders in a DynamoDB database, including CRUD operations and multi-threaded retrieval of orders based on tenant and shard information.

classes.name: Order
classes.description: Model class representing an order, imported from order_models.

methods.name: get_order
methods.description: Retrieves an order from DynamoDB based on a composite key.

methods.name: delete_order
methods.description: Deletes an order from DynamoDB based on a composite key.

methods.name: create_order
methods.description: Creates a new order in DynamoDB with a generated shard ID and UUID.

methods.name: update_order
methods.description: Updates an existing order in DynamoDB with new order details.

methods.name: get_orders
methods.description: Retrieves all orders for a given tenant, using multi-threaded queries across partitions.

methods.name: __query_all_partitions
methods.description: Spawns threads to query all tenant partitions for orders.

methods.name: __get_tenant_data
methods.description: Retrieves order data for a specific tenant partition and appends to response list.

methods.name: __get_dynamodb_table
methods.description: Configures and returns a DynamoDB table resource based on deployment mode.

methods.name: get_order_products_dict
methods.description: Converts order product objects into dictionaries for DynamoDB storage.
